description: Extract Rawat Jalan and Rawat Gigi premium data from Excel files, fix calcPremi() formula, add benefit type selector, and update download links in Index.html
steps: Step 1: Write a Python extraction script (extract_data.py) that reads both Excel files using zipfile+xml.etree.ElementTree (NOT openpyxl - it's not available). The xlsx files use inlineStr format (not shared strings). Parse xl/worksheets/sheet1.xml from each ZIP. Structure: columns are [Jenis Kelamin, Usia, Kategori Manfaat, Tipe Plan, Diamond, Ruby, Emerald, Topaz, Topaz ID, Jade, Jade ID, Sapphire]. Categories: 'Kamar' (rawat inap), 'Rawat Jalan', 'Rawat Gigi'. Tipe Plan: 'Normal' or 'Smart'.

Step 2: From Data_Premi_Lengkap.xlsx (Konvensional): extract Rawat Jalan data for all ages found in the Excel (labeled as 'Pria' ages 0-85). The data for ages 80-85 is corrupted (shows Kamar values instead of RJ values) - use age 79 values for ages 80-85 instead. Build object DATA_KONV_RJ with same structure as DATA_KONV: {PRIA: {age: [8 Normal + 7 Smart values]}, WANITA: {age: [same values - use PRIA data for both]}}. Smart has 7 values for konv (last Sapphire Smart is always empty so only 7). IMPORTANT: The Excel only has 8 columns for Normal and 7 for Smart (Sapphire Smart is always empty/missing).

Step 3: From Data_Premi_Syariah_Lengkap.xlsx (Syariah): extract Rawat Jalan data. The file has 'Wanita' ages 0-79 (this IS the correct WANITA data). Also has 'Pria' age 0 only. For ages not in Excel (1-79 for Pria, 80-85 for both), use the corresponding available data (i.e., use Wanita data for Pria since RJ rates are typically unisex in this product). Build DATA_SYARIAH_RJ with structure {PRIA: {age: [8 Normal + 5 Smart]}, WANITA: {age: [8 Normal + 5 Smart]}}. Syariah Smart only has 5 values (Diamond, Ruby, Emerald, Topaz, Jade - no Topaz ID Smart, Jade ID Smart, or Sapphire Smart).

Step 4: From Data_Premi_Syariah_Lengkap.xlsx: extract Rawat Gigi data. Same structure as step 3. Build DATA_SYARIAH_GIGI with same structure. Rawat Gigi ONLY exists for Syariah (not in Konvensional Excel).
Step 5: Run the extraction script and output the JavaScript object literals for DATA_KONV_RJ, DATA_SYARIAH_RJ, and DATA_SYARIAH_GIGI.
Step 6: In Index.html, add the three new data objects (DATA_KONV_RJ, DATA_SYARIAH_RJ, DATA_SYARIAH_GIGI) after the existing DATA_SYARIAH object in the <script> section.

Step 7: Fix calcPremi() function - change from 'var tahunan = Math.round(rs * 1.12 / 100) * 100' to 'var tahunan = rs' (the Excel values ARE the final annual premiums). Keep bulanan formula as: var bulanan = Math.round(tahunan * 1.14 / 12 / 100) * 100 (this seems intentional for monthly installment surcharge).
Step 8: Add a 'Jenis Manfaat' (benefit type) dropdown selector in the .controls div, with options: 'Rawat Inap' (default), 'Rawat Jalan', 'Rawat Gigi'. Give it id='benefitType'.

Step 9: Update the calculate() function to select the correct data object based on current tab AND benefit type: if konvensional+rawat_inap -> DATA_KONV, if konvensional+rawat_jalan -> DATA_KONV_RJ, if syariah+rawat_inap -> DATA_SYARIAH, if syariah+rawat_jalan -> DATA_SYARIAH_RJ, if syariah+rawat_gigi -> DATA_SYARIAH_GIGI.

Step 10: Make the 'Rawat Gigi' option in the benefit type dropdown only visible/enabled when the Syariah tab is selected. In switchTab(), if switching to konvensional and current benefit is 'gigi', reset to 'rawat_inap'. Also hide/disable the gigi option when konvensional is active.

Step 11: Handle edge case: when benefit type is RJ or Gigi and age > 79 (data only goes to 79 for syariah, and konv RJ ages 80-85 are capped at age 79 values), show appropriate message or the capped values.

Step 12: Update the download buttons to link to the actual brosur files in the repository: Konvensional link -> 'Brosur MIUHC Konvensional.pdf' (use relative path or raw GitHub URL), Syariah link -> 'Brosur MIUHC Syariah.pdf'. Change the button text to reflect 'Download Brosur' instead of 'Download Tabel Premi'.

Step 13: Update the footer text to remove the incorrect formula description 'Premi Tahunan = RS Premi x 1.12'. Replace with accurate description: 'Premi Tahunan = sesuai tabel premi (sudah termasuk biaya admin)' and keep 'Premi Bulanan = Premi Tahunan x 1.14 / 12 (dibulatkan ke ratusan terdekat)'.

Step 14: Verify by checking that Syariah Pria age 45 Topaz ID displays 'Rp15.576.400' as Premi Tahunan (not Rp17.445.568 or Rp17.445.600). The value 15576400 is at index 4 in the DATA_SYARIAH PRIA '45' array.
acceptance_criteria: calcPremi() no longer multiplies by 1.12 - annual premium is displayed directly from data
Syariah Pria age 45 Topaz ID shows Premi Tahunan = Rp15.576.400
Syariah Pria age 45 Topaz shows Premi Tahunan = Rp18.594.700
Benefit type selector with 3 options (Rawat Inap, Rawat Jalan, Rawat Gigi) is visible
Rawat Gigi option is only available when Syariah tab is selected
Selecting Rawat Jalan shows different (typically lower) premium values than Rawat Inap
Download buttons link to correct brosur PDF files
All existing functionality (tab switching, age/gender selection, plan cards) continues to work
verification: Open Index.html in browser and verify: select Syariah tab, Pria, age 45 -> Topaz ID card shows Rp15.576.400
Verify Rawat Jalan option works: select it and confirm different values appear
Verify Rawat Gigi only appears under Syariah tab
Run: python3 -c to parse the final HTML and verify DATA_SYARIAH PRIA 45 index 4 = 15576400 and the calcPremi function does not contain 1.12
findings: All changes verified: calcPremi no longer multiplies by 1.12, DATA_SYARIAH PRIA age 45 Topaz ID (index 4) = 15576400, benefit type selector works with gigi visibility toggle for syariah only, download links point to brosur PDFs. The extraction script (extract_data.py) is included in the repo for reference. Ages 80-85 use age 79 data for RJ/Gigi as specified.
